course: Data Fundamentals — Excel for Data Analysts

modules.name: Getting Started with Excel Data Analysis
modules.description: Organize data in Excel, set up sample databases, and understand the extract-transform-load (ETL) process.

lessons.title: Extract, Transform, and Load
topics: ETL in the context of Excel

modules.name: Importing Data
modules.description: Import data into Excel from external sources including APIs and the web.

modules.name: Introduction to Power Query
modules.description: Use Power Query in Excel for data transformation, custom columns, and conditional columns.

modules.name: Cleaning and Transforming Data
modules.description: Clean and transform data using various Excel methods and techniques.

modules.name: Pivot Tables
modules.description: Create and use pivot tables to summarize and analyze data in Excel.

modules.name: Creating Charts
modules.description: Create charts in Excel and handle data relationships in visualizations.

modules.name: Geographic Data & Data Exploration
modules.description: Work with geographic data in Excel and explore datasets from sources like Kaggle.

modules.name: Data Analysis ToolPak and Correlation
modules.description: Use the Data Analysis ToolPak for descriptive statistics, covariance, and correlation analysis.

modules.name: Rank, Percentile, Probability Distributions, and Histograms
modules.description: Calculate rank, percentile, and probability distributions, and create histograms in Excel.
